text:
Once upon a time in the mystical forest lived a giant panda named Glickybaljo.

Every morning he awoke with a rumble, hungered for bamboo. Once he sat down to eat, he noticed something shiny in his bamboo stalk.

It was Gigglesybooshie—the fairy.

She fluttered her wings and fluttered closer. "Oh my goodness, hello there!" She chirruped. "Good morning!"

Glickybaljo tipped his big head in greeting. "Good morning! I hope you're hungry!

Gigglesybooshie fluttered down to pluck one of the tiny mushrooms. It had magical properties.

"Guh-huh?

Oh yes! There!

Thanks.

Gigglesybooshie fluttered away.

The next morning, Glickybaljo reached out and plucked one. It wasn't magical at all.

That's better.
